capabilities.evidence: rcl_bridge.c:122-130 crcl_publisher_create rejects any type absent from crcl_marshal_registry.c, so route (a) (typed/serialized via rmw) cannot open a publisher; on that miss RclClient.createRawWriterPublisher falls back to route (b) — the CDDSBridge raw-CDR writer below rmw (sibling participant on the context domain, DDS topic/type via SwiftROS2Wire, USER_DATA typehash). Served outside rcl's entity graph (a documented divergence) but interoperable with any ROS 2 subscriber by topic + DDS-type name. Proven in-process by crcl-nonbundled-loopback (route-b .rcl publish -> .dds wire subscribe, same domain) and by RclNonbundledPublishIntegrationTests (LAN). Unblocks Conduit AudioData + CompressedPointCloud2

latency.value: n/a — route-b raw-CDR = pure-Swift DDS path; perf = DDS baseline (M5)

soak.value: n/a — not a streaming publish data path (or covered by corpus / publish-side soak)

capabilities.evidence: RclClient.createSubscription falls back to a CDDSBridge raw-CDR reader on a registry miss (mirror of the publish route-b): a sibling participant on the context domain, DDS topic/type via SwiftROS2Wire + USER_DATA typehash; received below rmw (outside rcl's wait-set, a documented divergence) but interoperable with any ROS 2 publisher by topic + DDS-type name. Proven in-process by crcl-nonbundled-sub-loopback (.dds wire publish -> .rcl route-b subscribe, same domain) and by RclNonbundledSubscribeIntegrationTests (LAN). Pairs with publish.serialized.non_bundled for full non-bundled pub/sub.

capabilities.evidence: rcl_service.c crcl_service_create gated on crcl_srv_registry_lookup (12 bundled srv types, crcl_srv_registry.c); no byte-seam fallback for services. Wire path serves any ROS2ServiceType Non-bundled (arbitrary-type) services deferred-by-decision — no consumer (Conduit is a publisher); the pure-Swift wire path serves any ROS2ServiceType; a route-b raw-CDR fallback would require request/response GUID correlation for no current need (design 2026-06-13 §9 non-goal). Bundled types fully supported.
